## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, feedback, and next steps for SEO and content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content calibration articles are ready for publishing after minor edits; GrowthX team to access CMS and coordinate with SchoolAI for feature images](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [New SchoolAI team members (Nikki and Cam) to be integrated into the project workflow and given access to relevant tools](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Upcoming website redesign and positioning work for SchoolAI, leading up to April 2nd fundraising announcement](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Need to establish clear templates and roadmap to increase content production speed and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration and Feedback

  - [SchoolAI team, including educators, provided feedback on calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [GrowthX team made minor edits, mostly connecting sections](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing SEO performance with teacher-friendly content](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Articles deemed publishable after edits, tone aligns with existing blog content](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

### CMS Access and Publishing Process

  - [GrowthX team granted access to Framer CMS and Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [SchoolAI team to provide guidance on feature image standards](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [GrowthX can handle publishing but will coordinate with SchoolAI for image approval](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### Next Batch of Topics

  - [Marilyn prepared new topics for review](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Placeholder titles can be tweaked for relevance](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [GrowthX team to start working on approved topics immediately](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### Team Integration and Collaboration

  - [New SchoolAI team members (Nikki - performance marketing, Cam - growth marketing) to be added to project](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [GrowthX to share Airtable access and past meeting recordings for context](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Potential for collaboration between SEO and paid search efforts](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### SchoolAI Product Access and Resources

  - [Current signup process leads directly to product use](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Upcoming website redesign will include public-facing pages for different user roles](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Case studies and internal data not yet available but in development (collaborations with USB, Stanford, Gartner)](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)

### Improving Workflow and Efficiency

  - [Need to establish clear templates and roadmap for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose template adjustments or new templates to increase production speed](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [SchoolAI team committed to providing necessary resources for faster execution](https://fathom.video/share/uLic4YergFvFXhqapGy_a1X2VbPKzAPH?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
